---
description: "Conclude and delete an experiment branch. Shows pending work and a diffstat for a final review, then deletes the current repository's experiment branc"
---

Follow the workflow defined in `.claude/commands/exp-stop.md` in this
repository. Read that file and execute its steps exactly — it is the
canonical definition of the /exp-stop command; this prompt is a thin adapter
so the command stays single-sourced. Treat any text after the prompt
invocation as the command's arguments ($ARGUMENTS).
